summary: I am Adithya Nuz Pratama Putra, a full-stack software developer based in Central Jakarta, Indonesia. I build Makir (Males Mikir), an ERP platform for project-based businesses — covering CRM, quotation, sales order, purchase order, delivery, invoicing, and project profit monitoring in one connected system.

Our recent work focuses on TypeScript-first systems that unify CRM, quotation, sales order, purchase order, delivery, and invoicing into a single workflow. We own the process end to end — from schema design and stack decisions through frontend implementation, deployment, and production maintenance.

We care about software that reduces operational friction: real-time profit tracking per project, controlled multi-termin invoicing, installation scheduling, audit-ready financial data, and workflows that let teams focus on running the business instead of managing paperwork.
